name: Broccoli and Ziti Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ziti, cooked according to package
2 lbs (16 oz.) low fat Ricotta cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet.
2. Saute garlic until softened, not brown.
3. Stir broccoli into garlic oil; set aside.
4. In a 9x13 casserole dish, layer half tomato sauce, half the ziti, half Parmesan cheese and all Mozzarella (optional). Then layer all broccoli, all Ricotta, seasoned bread crumbs, and toasted wheat germ (optional).
5. Add remaining ziti, sauce, crumbs, and remaining Parmesan.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes (10 minutes longer if dish has been refrigerated before cooking).
7. Uncover during the last 15 minutes of cooking.
8. Sauce should be bubbling and top lightly brown.
